ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Off Calendar

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance - Lawrence S. Siracusa for Aishlin O'Coyle, proposed successor trustee.

The Court stated it was inclined to grant the petition but asked about bond. Mr. Siracusa presented an endorsed filed copy of a waiver of bond signed by the beneficiary, Mr. DeMizzo. The Court stated that the trust terms required a bond for a non-corporate fiduciary. Mr. Siracusa said the value of the trust was $65,000. The Court requested that the court order a non-court supervised bond. The Court granted the petition subject to review of the order. Mr. Siracusa to provide a revised order. The Court set a status date for 10/28 for filing the bond.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Sandy Hilton.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Continued To Oct-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
